blocking.detail: §1 (problem), §2 (users), §3 (must-haves), §5 (non-goals), and §8 (success metric) are still the unedited template placeholders. Per skills/vision/SKILL.md stopping conditions, /vision must refuse to produce a plan and ask the human to fill the product sections — NOT hallucinate a product. The graded outcome is BLOCK (no complete/blessed plan); if a lock is written at all it carries incomplete:true.

notes: The hardest negative: with no product input, concern applicability is UNDERIVABLE (applicability is derived from §3/§6/§8 — there is nothing to derive from). The failure this guards against is a run that invents must-haves/users to fill the void and emits a confident plan. Correct behavior: stop and escalate for human input. mustHaves is empty because none are stated; a run that returns any must-have here has fabricated it.
